subject: Offer — Senior Frontend Engineer at Vectrix Labs

messages.subject: Offer — Senior Frontend Engineer at Vectrix Labs
messages.body_text:
Hi Derek,

We're thrilled to extend an offer for the Senior Frontend Engineer role at Vectrix Labs.

Offer details:
- Base salary: $145,000/year
- Equity: 0.18% — 75,000 options, 4-year vest, 1-year cliff, $0.04 strike price
- Start date: February 3, 2026 (flexible)
- Benefits per the attached summary

Please review the attached offer letter and let us know your decision by January 24.

We're excited about the possibility of you joining the team.

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Offer — Senior Frontend Engineer at Vectrix Labs
messages.body_text:
Hi Nina,

Thank you so much for the offer and for the time the team spent with me. I have a lot of respect for what Marcus and Priya are building at Vectrix.

Unfortunately, I'm going to have to decline. I've accepted an offer elsewhere — the comp landed closer to my target ($160K base) and the role is fully remote without any in-person expectations.

I hope our paths cross again. Genuinely rooting for Vectrix.

— Derek Huang
derek.huang@email.com
messages.body_html:

messages.subject: Derek Huang declined — need to revisit the comp band
messages.body_text:
Priya,

Derek declined. He said comp was the issue — $145K wasn't close enough to his target and he accepted $160K elsewhere.

This is the second candidate in two months where we've lost at offer on comp. I think we need to move the band to $145K–$165K and be willing to go to $158–$165K for strong candidates. At $145K we're fighting with Series B companies on price and losing. Amanda at TalentBridge tells me the current SF market for this role is $155K–$170K.

Can we get this approved today so we can repost? Anya Chen is in the TalentBridge pipeline and her background is exactly what we need — I want to move fast.

— Marcus Webb
CTO, Vectrix Labs
marcus@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Derek Huang declined — need to revisit the comp band
messages.body_text:
Approved. New band: $145K–$165K. We can go to $160K without another approval cycle; above $160K ping me first.

Nina — update the JD and the TalentBridge brief today. Marcus — reach out to Amanda about Anya Chen.

— Priya Chandran
CEO, Vectrix Labs
priya@vectrix.io
